title: Nola Turns the Battle Chaotic
description: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: They have four types of dials....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: C'mon!! Who's hotori and who's kotori...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter who is who!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Watch out!! The gas will explode!!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: only a fool would think so.

summary: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
